# Torchbearers

Torchbearers builds governed data layers, semantic layers, and AI data agents for small and mid-market teams.

## Core Positioning

Torchbearers helps companies turn existing business data into trusted infrastructure for analytics, conversational interfaces, internal workflow agents, and customer-facing AI experiences.

The company focuses on:

- Data foundations: warehouses, pipelines, keys, timestamps, joins, access patterns, and data quality.
- Semantic layers: governed metrics, business entities, relationships, definitions, and permissions.
- Internal agents: secure LLM-powered interfaces for employees to ask questions, analyze performance, and trigger workflows.
- Customer agents: embedded AI analytics experiences that respect tenancy, permissions, and product context.

## Important URLs

- Homepage: https://torchbearers.ai/
- Sitemap: https://torchbearers.ai/sitemap.xml
